hooks.command: bash -lc 'if [ -n "${AGENT_COMMANDER_DIR:-}" ]; then export PATH="$AGENT_COMMANDER_DIR/bin:$PATH"; elif [ -d "$HOME/agent-commander/bin" ]; then export PATH="$HOME/agent-commander/bin:$PATH"; else export PATH="$HOME/github/agent-commander/bin:$PATH"; fi; exec gh-axi'

bash -lc 'if [ -n "${AGENT_COMMANDER_DIR:-}" ]; then export PATH="$AGENT_COMMANDER_DIR/bin:$PATH"; elif [ -d "$HOME/agent-commander/bin" ]; then export PATH="$HOME/agent-commander/bin:$PATH"; else export PATH="$HOME/github/agent-commander/bin:$PATH"; fi; exec chrome-devtools-axi'
